focus: ESP32 LED ring motion sensor integration complete — firmware flashed to device
context: Cycles C228-C229 built and tested HC-SR501 PIR motion detection on ESP32. C230 completes firmware update with non-blocking polling architecture. Rings now have environmental awareness without requiring constant app polling.
artifacts_produced_this_cycle: Updated rings.ino firmware (38KB) with motion sensor support
Motion detection integrated into all animation states including FIRE
Non-blocking debounce implementation prevents blocking loop() during motion events
error_gap_resolved: Firmware feature gap between motion sensor hardware capability and actual ring behavior
